note: Tier audit (Bossing A). Acid Ammo: 'upon reloading to max, the first round deals sustained damage 192%/s for 30s' — re-applied every reload (~5s cadence) so effectively permanent; the parser's one-shot 30s passive dot died at t=30 -> duration extended to whole fight. Burst forced-reload economy unsupported (warned). S1 normalAttack +30 passive, burst-cast team True Damage 34.99 parse fine. PROBE CALIBRATION ⚑ (run I, 2.09 hot): acid dot joins the U1 exempt class (noFb; rider range exemption universal). Residual heat flagged if it persists. CADENCE FIX (2026-07-13, test battery 2 test 4, jill focus video): her datamined rate_of_fire is 150 rpm = 2.5 shots/sec (magnum), NOT the assault-rifle class default ~740 rpm - the video's ammo counter drops one round per ~0.4-0.5s. Her per-hit popup values matched the sim at 99.7% across all four classes (body 180,633 / core hit 319,582 / crit 250,107 / acid tick 288,662), so the entire 1.67 heat was cadence. charFixes.pullsPerSec 2.5. ROLLING RELOAD (datamined shot row): reload_start_ammo=8 - she begins reloading at 8/9 ammo and tops up concurrently while firing (fire never stops; the video shows no reload gaps). Modeled as reloadFrames 0 (the 13-frame engine tail is the only pause). noFb RELIC REMOVED (2026-07-15, autonomous-invariant-audit): her 192%/s acid (sustained, permanent) carried noFb:true -- a relic (DECISIONS names these 6 units' noFb as relics; sustained damage gets +50% by FB timing, only Modernia Paradise Lost is type-exempt). noRange KEPT (universal). Her per-hit values are VIDEO-CONFIRMED at 99.7% incl. the acid tick (288,662) and the heat was already cadence (pullsPerSec 2.5) -- so applying FB to her (correctly-valued) in-FB acid ticks is the faithful result: she now grades ~1.07-1.34, hottest in high-FB / elem-advantage comps (T2 elec-weak) where acid spends more ticks inside FB. Since per-hit values check out, the residual is FB-uptime, not a coefficient. OPEN: confirm her acid tick jumps x1.5 inside FB from the battery-2-test-4 focus video (the 288,662 read was ambiguous on FB-state); do NOT re-fudge.
